fields.name: Summarize audit findings
fields.prompt_text: Please review the audit log entries for this location and provide a concise summary of the key findings, including fixture types, quantities, and any flagged items that may require attention.

fields.name: Identify energy savings opportunities
fields.prompt_text: Based on the audit data, identify the top energy savings opportunities for this location. Focus on high-wattage fixtures, areas without occupancy controls, and fixtures lacking daylight harvesting.

fields.name: Flag compliance issues
fields.prompt_text: Review the audit entries and identify any potential code compliance issues, including emergency backup (EMBB) requirements, wet location ratings, 480V fixtures, and any items flagged during the audit.
